name: Sweet 'n' Sour Sauced Pork Bbs Sss
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Carrot - cut thinly with a slant cut
1 small Green Bell Pepper - seeded and cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Partially freeze pork and thinly slice into bite-size strips.
2. Preheat a 10-inch microwave browning dish on 100% power for 5 minutes.
3. Add cooking oil and sesame oil to the dish. Swirl to coat the dish.
4. Add the pork. Micro-cook, covered, on 100% power for 2 to 3 minutes or until pork is no longer pink, stirring every minute.
5. Stir in sliced carrot, green pepper strips, and sliced green onions. Micro-cook, covered, on 100% power for 2 to 4 minutes more or until vegetables are crisp-tender.
6. Drain off liquid.
7. In a 2-cup measure, stir together brown sugar and cornstarch. Stir in water, red wine vinegar, soy sauce, and ground ginger.
8. Micro-cook, uncovered, on 100% power for 1 to 1/2 minutes or until thickened and bubbly, stirring every 30 seconds.
9. Stir in drained pineapple chunks. Micro-cook, uncovered, on 100% power for about 45 seconds more or until pineapple is heated through.
10. Toss the pineapple mixture with the pork mixture.
11. Serve with cooked rice.
